fields.name: useSsl
fields.label: Use SSL
fields.helpText: Use secure connection when connection to Sabnzbd

fields.name: urlBase
fields.label: URL Base
fields.helpText: Adds a prefix to the Sabnzbd url, such as http://[host]:[port]/[urlBase]/api

fields.name: movieCategory
fields.label: Category
fields.helpText: Adding a category specific to Radarr avoids conflicts with unrelated non-Radarr downloads. Using a category is optional, but strongly recommended.

fields.name: recentMoviePriority
fields.label: Recent Priority
fields.helpText: Priority to use when grabbing movies that aired within the last 21 days

fields.name: olderMoviePriority
fields.label: Older Priority
fields.helpText: Priority to use when grabbing movies that aired over 21 days ago

fields.name: categories
fields.label: Categories
fields.helpText: Drop down list, at least one category must be selected.

fields.name: multiLanguages
fields.label: Multi Languages
fields.helpText: What languages are normally in a multi release on this indexer?

fields.name: failDownloads
fields.label: Fail Downloads
fields.helpText: While processing completed downloads Radarr will treat these selected filetypes as failed downloads.

fields.name: removeYear
fields.label: Remove year from search query
fields.helpText: Should Radarr remove the year after the title when searching this indexer?

fields.name: seedCriteria.seedRatio
fields.label: Seed Ratio
fields.helpText: The ratio a torrent should reach before stopping, empty uses the download client's default. Ratio should be at least 1.0 and follow the indexers rules

fields.name: seedCriteria.seedTime
fields.label: Seed Time
fields.helpText: The time a torrent should be seeded before stopping, empty uses the download client's default

fields.name: rejectBlocklistedTorrentHashesWhileGrabbing
fields.label: Reject Blocklisted Torrent Hashes While Grabbing
fields.helpText: If a torrent is blocked by hash it may not properly be rejected during RSS/Search for some indexers, enabling this will allow it to be rejected after the torrent is grabbed, but before it is sent to the client.

fields.name: requiredFlags
fields.label: Required Flags
fields.helpText: Select which indexer flags should be mandatory. Leave blank to use with all flags.

body.title: The Matrix

alternateTitles.title: เพาะพันธุ์มนุษย์เหนือโลก

body.overview: Set in the 22nd century, The Matrix tells the story of a computer hacker who joins a group of underground insurgents fighting the vast and powerful computers who now rule the earth.
